% This is generated by ESQL's RangeMaxTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

## Example

```esql
FROM decades
| WHERE decade == 1900
| EVAL max_bound = RANGE_MAX(date_range)
| KEEP date_range, max_bound
```

| date_range:date_range | max_bound:date |
| --- | --- |
| 1900-01-01..1910-01-01 | 1910-01-01T00:00:00.000Z |
